title: SpectrePack
description:
The Official Spectre SMP Modpack
For accessibility and ease of use when playing on the Spectre SMP server.
body:
# SpectrePack 1.21.4
This is the official modpack for the Spectre SMP server. It comes with most (if not all) the necessary mods to enjoy the game without lag and with the best fidelity.

## What's included?
- Performance mods for smoother frames
- Lots of useful ease-of-access mods
- Tons of beautiful vanilla+ aesthetic mods
- Server-side mods with built in compatibility
- Built in common shader packs and resource packs

## Why use this modpack?

You don't need to! It's simply there to help out when starting out on the SMP or could even act as a good foundation for other purposes.

![View of spawn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4af4802682f5a9d326502d141689cfa1261e2ad6_0.webp)
